docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED FEB-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, DIEGO

REQUEST TO WAIVE INTERPRETER FEES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, DIEGO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER FEES GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NERI-CARMONA, SUSANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, DIEGO PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NERI-CARMONA, SUSANA AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, DIEGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THIS PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY INTERPRETER, XOCHITL MONGE IN THE SPANISH LANGUAGE. INTERPRETER IS ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THIS DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER, ELLEN ROSENTHAL IN THE SPANISH LANGUAGE. THE PLAINTIFF'S WITNESSES JOAQUINA CARMONA AND CARMEN GOMEZ WERE SWORN AND EXAMINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.
